creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
This version appears to be badly broken.

I get a seg fault, core dumped when trying to create a new connection.

Scaled mode no longer works with VNC. Sometimes I get a black window and other times I see what I should, but seriously shrunken and distorted.  I worked around it by setting a scaling factor on the server end.  Not an option for everyone.

Have you thought about rolling back to an earlier version and working out the bugs in this one behind the scenes?

Cheers...
